name: vue_typescript_frontend_change
prompt: Vue 3 + TypeScript の画面にAPI取得、loading/error/empty状態、フォーム入力を追加してください。
expected_behavior: Inspects existing frontend conventions before editing.
Keeps API details out of page components.
Models loading, empty, error, success, and mutation states explicitly.
Uses TypeScript types without unnecessary any.
Runs or reports available lint/test commands.
